proposed_changes: Add dynamic ATR band sizing for Gold Grid Bot during policy-event weeks.
Require 3-signal macro confluence before activating BTC high-beta mode.
Introduce time-of-day filter to avoid low-liquidity fills.
Lower leverage cap when US10Y rises above 4.4%.
